Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message',''\) or obj.get\('msg',''\) or str\(obj\) if any\(k in msg.lower\(\) for k in ['high4','not spring','spotify','query']\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) except: if any\(k in line.lower\(\) for k in ['high4','not spring']\): print\(line\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message',''\) or '' if 'through the night' in msg.lower\(\) or 'iu' in msg.lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) msg = obj.get\('message',''\) or '' logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = msg + ' ' + ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'through' in all_text.lower\(\) or \('iu' in all_text and 'night' in all_text.lower\(\)\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'akmu' in all_text.lower\(\) or 'heartbreak' in all_text.lower\(\) or '어떻게 이별까지' in all_text: print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = obj.get\('message',''\) + ' ' + ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if any\(k in all_text for k in ['오류', 'error', 'Error', '500', 'fail', 'catch', 'exception']\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: print\(line\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json entries = [] for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: entries.append\(json.loads\(line\)\) except: pass print\(f'총 {len\(entries\)}개 로그'\) for e in entries: path = e.get\('requestPath',''\) status = e.get\('responseStatusCode'\) ts = e.get\('timestamp'\) msg = e.get\('message',''\)[:80] print\(f' [{status}] {path} | {msg}'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'dive' in all_text.lower\(\) or 'iu' in all_text.lower\(\): print\(json.dumps\(obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'dive' in all_text.lower\(\): ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts}]'\) for l in logs: print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'dive' in all_text.lower\(\) or 'c4396561' in all_text.lower\(\): ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts}]'\) for l in logs: print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) path = obj.get\('requestPath',''\) if 'c4396561' in path: ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts}] {path}'\) for l in obj.get\('logs',[]\): print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('requestPath',''\) == '/api/analyze': ts = obj['timestamp'] / 1000 kst = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(ts\) print\(f'[{kst.strftime\(\\"%H:%M:%S\\"\)} KST]'\) for l in obj.get\('logs',[]\): print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('requestPath',''\) != '/api/analyze': continue logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'dive' in all_text.lower\(\) or 'iu' in all_text.lower\(\): ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts} KST]'\) for l in logs: print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime entries = [] for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('requestPath',''\) == '/api/analyze': entries.append\(obj\) except: pass entries.sort\(key=lambda x: x['timestamp'], reverse=True\) print\(f'총 analyze 로그: {len\(entries\)}개'\) print\(f'최신: {datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(entries[0][\\"timestamp\\"]/1000\).strftime\(\\"%H:%M:%S\\"\) if entries else \\"없음\\"}'\) print\(f'최구: {datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(entries[-1][\\"timestamp\\"]/1000\).strftime\(\\"%H:%M:%S\\"\) if entries else \\"없음\\"}'\) print\(\) for obj in entries[:3]: ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts}]'\) for l in obj.get\('logs',[]\): print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('requestPath',''\) != '/api/analyze': continue ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) status = obj.get\('responseStatusCode'\) print\(f'[{ts} KST] status={status}'\) for l in obj.get\('logs',[]\): print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")

Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json, datetime for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) if obj.get\('requestPath',''\) != '/api/analyze': continue logs = obj.get\('logs', []\) all_text = ' '.join\(l.get\('message',''\) for l in logs\) if 'brave' in all_text.lower\(\) or 'we ride' in all_text.lower\(\) or '롤린' in all_text or '브레이브' in all_text: ts = datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp\(obj['timestamp']/1000\).strftime\('%H:%M:%S'\) print\(f'[{ts} KST]'\) for l in logs: print\(f' {l.get\(\\"message\\",\\"\\"\)}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
